changes: Added X DM outreach capability to autonomous CMO agent with Claude personalization, candidate dedup, and state management
Implemented TypeScript syntax gate + deliverable verification in orchestrator before supervisor review
Added complexity-aware LLM routing with CEO cost reduction — new files route to Claude Sonnet, edits to MiniMax-M2.5
Fixed invoices router with v1 REST routes (GET /v1/invoices, POST /v1/invoices/pay, GET /v1/invoices/:id)
Hardened orchestrator reset logic with path normalization, no-commit guards, and tsc regex anchoring
Fixed email support loop with spam domain blocklist and restored CTO monitoring suite (daily scan, support tickets, tech watch)
Shipped Mission Control — real-time agent operations visibility with PM2 process monitoring and Telegram alerts
Integrated autonomous post-sprint pipeline: test → CTO review → Vercel deploy with self-healing watchdog
Added CMO weekly content plan generator (Sunday 06:00 UTC) with CEO approval gate and X posting integration
Implemented git auto-deploy — server self-deploys from GitHub every 5 minutes with safety gates and pre-deploy TS checks
Added agent wallet spending with x402 USDC pricing (0.003 USDC per call) and live balance monitoring via multi-RPC
Launched live docs auto-generation system with weekly changelog, API contract, and data-driven frontend pages
Added X/Twitter marketing automation agent (@invoica_ai) with autonomous posting and CEO review gates
Launched Telegram support integration with live support button and CEO bot assistant (/sprint, /pm2, /health commands)
Implemented x402 USDC payment settlement — agents autonomously spend tokens on LLM calls with batched queue
Added multi-chain architecture foundation (Base, Polygon, Solana) with EIP-3009 signer support
Launched beta onboarding flow with company profile verification (12 countries), API key generation, and Stripe billing
Added system status pages for infrastructure health monitoring across dashboard and public website
New Web3 Growth plan at $24/mo with 5,000 invoices and 25,000 API calls
Web3 projects see tailored pricing during onboarding
Registered companies see Free + Pro ($49) + Enterprise tiers
Added Plans & Pricing documentation page
Added backend API routes for invoices, API keys, webhooks, and settlements
Added Express app entry point with middleware stack
Completed SDK test coverage for retry, debug, and client-config modules
Fixed SDK import chain — all modules now use v2 transport and error handling
Added SDK tests for pagination, events, and timeout modules
New documentation pages: error handling, environments, quickstart
SDK consolidation — barrel exports, interceptors, environment detection
New tests for rate-limit, error-compat, and request-builder
Added webhook events and quickstart documentation
Initial release of Invoica TypeScript SDK
Core client with invoice, settlement, and API key management
Webhook signature verification and rate limiting
